howItWorks.intro: This llm token counter uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How many tokens is 1000 words?
faq.answer: Approximately 1,330 tokens for English text. Code tends to use more tokens (about 1,500 per 1,000 words) due to special characters and syntax.

faq.question: How do tokens work in LLMs?
faq.answer: LLMs break text into tokens — subword pieces that may be whole words, word parts, or individual characters. Common words are single tokens, while rare words get split into multiple tokens.
